key.name: theme
key.description: Whether to use auto (follow system), dark, or light theme for widgets.

key.name: opacity
key.description: Base opacity for all widgets (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: widget-snap-grid
key.description: When enabled, widgets will snap to a 20px grid when dragged.

key.name: weather-location
key.description: Location for weather widget as latitude,longitude (e.g., "40.7128,-74.0060") or "auto" for a default location.

key.name: widget-positions
key.description: List of widget types and their X,Y positions.
